title: World Cup 2026 Country-Guess Pub Quiz — answer is always the country
created_for: casual pub crowd; football plus pop culture, anthroponymy, geography, history, food, flags, landmarks and names
format_note: Each question is a clue. The answer field is the World Cup 2026 country name. The country name and common gentilic forms are intentionally omitted from that country’s own question text.
sources_note: Team list and group labels based on the 2026 World Cup 48-team field as verified June 2026 from FIFA/FOX/Al Jazeera summaries. Trivia clues use stable cultural, geographic, historical, and football facts.

questions.question: Which 2026 World Cup country is home to Chichén Itzá, the ancient city famous for the stepped pyramid known as El Castillo?
Which 2026 World Cup country was home to Casa Azul, the cobalt-blue house that became a museum dedicated to one of the 20th century’s most recognizable painters?
Which 2026 World Cup country’s national football team is nicknamed “El Tri” because of the three colors on its flag?
